title: croton womersleyi
intro: Croton womersleyi, also known as the Red Leaf Croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits associated with Croton womersleyi include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
